mapper.insert: INSERT INTO space(space_key, space_title, space_order, space_status, image_no) VALUES (#{spaceKey}, #{spaceTitle}, seq_space_order.nextVal, #{spaceStatus}, 1)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM space_members WHERE space_key IN ( SELECT space_key FROM space_members WHERE user_role = '관리자' AND user_no = #{userNo} )
